issues.title: SoD trigger race-prone

issues.title: Cross-tenant signoff not fully constrained

issues.title: Role DDL not existence-safe

issues.title: Phase-1-alone breaks pre-Spec-2 app paths

issues.title: 0139 idempotency predicate brittle

issues.title: Missing hot-path indexes + revision_version monotonic guard
